params.name: Audio Reactivity
params.description: How much audio affects the cells

params.name: Tensor Strength
params.description: Strength of tensor field influence on flow

params.name: Phase Speed
params.description: Speed of the temporal phase oscillation per channel.

params.name: Ghost Offset
params.description: Spatial displacement of each color ghost from the source.

params.name: Inversion Depth
params.description: How much depth accumulates extra phase (near objects phase faster).

params.name: Spatial Coherence
params.description: Mix of spatial noise field into the phase (low=global, high=local).

params.name: Dispersion Strength
params.description: How far each color channel drifts from the source.

params.name: Depth Curvature
params.description: How strongly depth data amplifies the prism bending.

params.name: Prism Twist
params.description: Rotational twist applied to each channel's dispersion vector.

params.name: Depth Weight
params.description: Blend weight between luminance gradient and depth curvature.

params.name: Fold Radius
params.description: Radius of each fold's influence sphere.

params.name: Vortex Speed
params.description: Speed and direction of the vortex rotation.

params.name: Mirror Blend
params.description: Blend strength between original and folded image.

params.name: Bleed Radius
params.description: Distance color bleeds outward from edges.

params.name: Curl Speed
params.description: Speed of the curl-noise vector field driving bleed direction.

params.name: Edge Threshold
params.description: Minimum edge magnitude required to trigger spectral bleed.

params.name: Crystal Thickness
params.description: Physical thickness affecting light path and absorption

params.name: Fracture Density
params.description: Internal fractures: 0 = pure crystal, 1 = heavily fractured

params.name: Brightness Threshold
params.description: Pixels brighter than this threshold will be sorted; darks are protected

params.name: Sort Window Size
params.description: Size of the local window for sorting (1-32 pixels)

params.name: Edge Influence
params.description: How much detected edges affect sorting direction and flow

params.name: Terrace Step Size
params.description: Size of stepped terraces characteristic of bismuth crystals

params.name: Ascension Speed
params.description: Camera movement speed through the crystal citadel

params.name: Metallic Shine
params.description: Specular highlight intensity on metallic surfaces

params.name: Iridescence Shift
params.description: Thin-film interference color shift on crystal surfaces

params.name: Rotation Speed
params.description: Speed of the contra-rotating ring structure.

params.name: Complexity
params.description: Number of rings and surface detail density.

params.name: Ring Scale
params.description: Overall size of the ring structure.

params.name: Core Intensity
params.description: Brightness of the central star and emitted light.

params.name: Color Speed
params.description: Speed at which surface color evolves independently of geometry.

params.name: Blend Radius
params.description: Smooth-min radius for SDF blending between shapes.

params.name: Light Intensity
params.description: Intensity of the key light illuminating the morphing form.

params.name: Crystal Purity
params.description: Crystal clarity affecting transmission and glow

params.name: Well Mass
params.description: Mass of each gravity well — controls bending strength.

params.name: Emission Scale
params.description: Brightness of tidal emission at field gradient maxima.

params.name: Tile Symmetry
params.description: Number of sides in the fundamental tile (maps to p=3–8).

params.name: Rotation Speed
params.description: Speed and direction of the global hyperbolic rotation.

params.name: Boundary Glow
params.description: Brightness of the glow near the Poincaré disk boundary.

params.name: Color Zoom
params.description: Zoom level into the color-space fractal.

params.name: Colormap Rotate
params.description: Global hue rotation of the colormap.

params.name: Bailout Radius
params.description: Escape radius — lower values create more intricate boundaries.

params.name: Magnetic Strength (Spikes)
params.description: Controls the height and intensity of the fluid spikes.

params.name: Fluid Density
params.description: Controls how many small spikes and structures form.

params.name: Oscillation Speed
params.description: Speed at which the fluid pulsates and shifts.

params.name: Iridescence Shift
params.description: Shifts the thin-film interference colors on the metallic surface.

params.name: Complexity
params.description: Recursion depth of hopper crystal formation

params.name: Wave Speed
params.description: Oscillation frequency of the quantum wave functions.

params.name: Crystal Purity
params.description: Ice crystal clarity: affects transmission and absorption

params.name: Crystal Thickness
params.description: Physical thickness affecting light path length

params.name: Motion Strength
params.description: Strength of motion vector displacement (creates smearing trails)

params.name: Smear Blend
params.description: How much displaced pixels blend with current frame

params.name: Trail Decay
params.description: How long motion trails persist (higher=longer trails)

params.name: Flow Field Scale
params.description: Scale of the flow field pattern

params.name: Organic Growth
params.description: Amount of organic growth over circuits

params.name: Noise Scale
params.description: Scale of the FBM noise pattern

params.name: Kaleidoscope Segments
params.description: Number of mirror segments in kaleidoscope

params.name: Plasma Detail
params.description: Detail level of plasma noise displacement

params.name: Hue Shift
params.description: Color shift based on frequency band

params.name: Metallic / Mix
params.description: Metallic reflection strength and effect mix

params.name: Detail Preserve
params.description: How much high-frequency detail is added back after warping.

params.name: Flow Speed
params.description: Speed of the time-varying noise flow that modulates the tensor.

params.name: Tensor Mode
params.description: Blend from stretch-dominant (0) to shear-dominant (1) deformation.

params.name: Ice Purity
params.description: Crystal clarity: Pure ice transmits more light, cloudy ice scatters more

params.name: Crystal Purity
params.description: Crystal clarity: Pure transmits more, impure scatters more

params.name: Facet Count
params.description: Number of crystal facets around mouse

params.name: IOR / Dispersion
params.description: Refractive index affecting chromatic dispersion: Quartz to Diamond

params.name: Crystal Thickness
params.description: Physical thickness affecting light transmission and absorption

params.name: Interlace Strength
params.description: Controls interlacing artifact intensity, field persistence, and combing on motion

params.name: HSync Error
params.description: Horizontal sync instability - creates rolling bars and horizontal displacement

params.name: VSync Error
params.description: Vertical sync roll - creates image rolling and retrace bars

params.name: Color Burst Error
params.description: Chroma phase errors causing hue shifts and chroma noise
